rationale: The agent correctly identified PR #2, read the diff, spotted the URL-encoding bug in build_uri_with_token(), and produced a well-reasoned REQUEST_CHANGES review covering all required security points (token-in-argv visibility and connection-string injection). However, no pull_request_review_write tool call was made — the review was only stated in the final answer text but never submitted via the required API call. The task required submitting a review; stating one in text without calling the tool means the core action was not performed.
